text.message: Blocing that 3 doesnt mean anything man
Bro I share all spots with them
Don’t wanna solo anyone just yet
Just don’t make bad trades and we’ll be fine
Wanted to test blacks dev too
i'm just gonna steal from you anyway sorry
Need a 7 to restrict another city of blue
Bro you’re leading and you want me plowed?
Stop tryna plow me im 2nd by a mile
I can plow him with little help
But you dont want to help thats all
Are you still gonna accept trades with red?
Gotta block his brick so he can’t get it back
See red? If i could settle there you still have a game
You wanted the road thats why didn’t help me
